records.morph: [imp. & p. p. Reimbursed (-b?rst"); p. pr. & vb. n. Reimbursing.]

defs: To replace in a treasury or purse, as an equivalent for what has been taken, lost, or expended; to refund; to pay back; to restore; as, to reimburse the expenses of a war.
To make restoration or payment of an equivalent to (a person); to pay back to; to indemnify; -- often reflexive; as, to reimburse one's self by successful speculation.
